key_learnings: Comprehensive understanding of gut microbiome composition, diversity metrics, and their influence on nutrient absorption, immune function, and metabolic health. Mastered analysis of 16S rRNA and shotgun metagenomic sequencing data.
research_findings: Specific gut bacteria strains (Lactobacillus, Bifidobacterium, Akkermansia muciniphila) significantly influence nutrient absorption rates for vitamins B12, K2, and short-chain fatty acids. Documented diet-microbiome feedback loops.
current_focus_areas: Personalized probiotic and prebiotic dietary recommendations, microbiome restoration protocols, and diet-driven microbiome modulation strategies.
learning_log: 2026-05-01: Progress updated to 95%. Completed advanced microbiome-nutrition interaction analysis.
